regex.source: .setDesc('Auto zoom & pan the map to fit search results, including Follow Active Note.')
regex.target: .setDesc('自动缩放和平移地图以适应搜索结果，包括“跟随活动笔记”。')

regex.source: .setDesc('The service used for searching for geolocations. To use Google, see details in the plugin documentation.')
regex.target: .setDesc('用于搜索地理位置的服务。要使用 Google，请参阅插件文档中的详细信息。')

regex.source: .setDesc('If using Google as the geocoding search provider, paste the API key here. See the plugin documentation for more details. Changes are applied after restart.')
regex.target: .setDesc('如果选择 Google 作为地理编码搜索的提供商，请将 API 密钥粘贴到此处。有关更多详细信息，请参阅插件文档。更改将在重启后生效。')

regex.source: .setDesc('Use Google Places API instead of Google Geocoding to get higher-quality results. Your API key must have a specific Google Places permission turned on! See the plugin documentation for more details.')
regex.target: .setDesc('使用 Google Places API 而非 Google 地理编码以获取更高质量的结果。您的 API 密钥必须启用特定的 Google Places 权限！有关更多详细信息，请参阅插件文档。')

regex.source: .setDesc('Delay in ms to wait before searching while you type (required to not flood the search provider with every key).')
regex.target: .setDesc('输入时搜索前的延迟（毫秒），以避免每次按键都向搜索提供商发送请求。')

regex.source: .setDesc('Date/times in the format can be wrapped in {{date:...}}, e.g. "note-{{date:YYYY-MM-DD}}". Search queries can be added with {{query}}.')
regex.target: .setDesc('格式中的日期/时间可以包含在 {{date:...}} 中，例如“note-{{date:YYYY-MM-DD}}”。搜索查询可以通过 {{query}} 添加。')

regex.source: .setDesc('Disk path for notes created from the map.')
regex.target: .setDesc('从地图创建的笔记的磁盘路径。')

regex.source: .setDesc('Choose the file to use as a template, e.g. "templates/map-log.md".')
.setDesc('Maximal radius in pixels to cover in a marker cluster. Lower values will produce smaller map clusters. (Requires restart.)')
regex.target: .setDesc('标记聚合簇的最大覆盖半径（像素）。值越低，地图聚合簇越小。（需要重启。）')

regex.source: .setDesc('When jumping to the map from a note, what should be the display zoom? This is also used as a max zoom for "Map follows search results" above.')
regex.target: .setDesc('从笔记跳转到地图时，显示缩放级别应是多少？这也被用作上述“地图跟随搜索结果”的最大缩放。')

regex.source: .setDesc('Allow zooming further than the maximum defined for the map source, interpolating the image of the highest available zoom.')
regex.target: .setDesc('允许缩放超过地图源定义的最大值，插值最高可用缩放的图像。')

regex.source: .setDesc('While making changes to the map, save the history to be browsable through Obsidian back/forward buttons.')
regex.target: .setDesc('在对地图进行更改时，保存历史记录，以便通过 Obsidian 的前进/后退按钮进行浏览。')

regex.source: .setDesc('What query to use for following active notes (in the main or mini view), $PATH$ being the file path.')
regex.target: .setDesc('用于跟随活动笔记（在主视图或迷你视图中）的查询，其中 $PATH$ 是文件路径。')

regex.source: .setDesc('Monitor the clipboard and add a "locations:" front-matter if a supported geolocation is pasted from the keyboard.')
regex.target: .setDesc('检索剪贴板，如果复制过地理坐标，则在粘贴时添加名为“locations:” 的元数据。')

regex.source: .setDesc('The key Map View uses to denote a front matter geolocation. Restart required. Beware: changing this will make your old front matter key not recognized as geolocations by Map View.')
regex.target: .setDesc('地图视图中用于表示地理位置元数据的键。需要重启。请注意：更改此项将导致地图视图无法将您旧的 元数据的键识别为地理坐标。')

regex.source: .setDesc('Instead or in addition to the "locations:" YAML tag, you can use a regular tag that will mark for Map View that a note has inline geolocations, e.g. "#hasLocations". (Note: this has a performance penalty for the time being.)')
regex.target: .setDesc('除YAML 标签外，您还可以使用一个常规标签来标记地图视图中包含内联地理位置的笔记，例如“#hasLocations”。（注意：目前这会增加功耗。）')

regex.source: .setDesc('URL to use for calculating and showing routes and directions, used for "route to point". {x0},{y0} are the source lat,lng and {x1},{y1} are the destination lat,lng.')
regex.target: .setDesc('用于计算和显示路线和方向的 URL，用于“路线到点”。{x0},{y0} 是源经纬度，{x1},{y1} 是目标经纬度。')

regex.source: .setDesc('How and if Map View handles geolinks in notes (both front matter and inline)')
regex.target: .setDesc('地图视图如何以及是否处理笔记中的地理链接（包括元数据和内联字段）')

regex.source: .setDesc('When turned on, Map View will handle geolinks internally, and turn front matter locations into links. (Requires restarting Obsidian to update correctly.)')
regex.target: .setDesc('启用后，地图视图将内部处理地理链接，并将元数据的位置转换为链接。（需要重启 Obsidian 才能更新。）')

regex.source: .setDesc('Show a popup with a map preview when hovering on geolinks in notes. Requires "Geolinks in Notes" above.')
regex.target: .setDesc('在笔记中悬停地理链接时，显示带有地图预览的弹出窗口。需要打开上面的“笔记中的地理链接”功能。')

regex.source: .setDesc('Zoom level to use for the geolink map preview popup.')
regex.target: .setDesc('地理链接地图预览弹出窗口的缩放级别。')

regex.source: .setDesc('Override the Obsidian context menu for geolinks in notes, making sure Map View "open in" items are shown correctly. Requires "Geolinks in Notes" above.')
regex.target: .setDesc('覆盖 Obsidian 笔记中地理链接的上下文菜单，确保地图视图的“打开方式”项正确显示。需要打开上面的“笔记中的地理链接”功能。')

regex.source: .setDesc('What is shown when hovering (desktop) or clicking (mobile) map markers.')
regex.target: .setDesc('悬停（桌面）或点击（移动）地图标记时显示的内容。')

regex.source: .setDesc('Show a popup with the note name when hovering on a map marker.')
regex.target: .setDesc('悬停在地图标记上时，显示带有笔记名称的弹出窗口。')

regex.source: .setDesc('In the popup above, show also the link name, in the case of an inline link.')
regex.target: .setDesc('在上面的弹出窗口中，即使是内联链接，也显示链接名称。')

regex.source: .setDesc('In addition to the note name, show a preview if the note contents. Either way, it will be displayed only if the map is large enough to contain it.')
regex.target: .setDesc('除了笔记名称，如果笔记内容足够大，还会显示预览。无论如何，只有当地图足够大才能显示。')

regex.source: .setDesc('Show a hover popup summarizing the icons inside a marker cluster.')
regex.target: .setDesc('显示一个悬停弹出窗口，其中包含标记聚合簇内的图标摘要。')

regex.source: .setDesc('Control when and if Map View should use panes vs tabs, new panes vs existing ones etc.')
regex.target: .setDesc('控制地图视图何时以及是否应使用窗口与标签页、新窗口与现有窗口等。')

regex.source: .setDesc('How should the corresponding note be opened following a click on a marker?')
regex.target: .setDesc('点击标记后，应该如何打开相应笔记？')

regex.source: .setDesc('How should the corresponding note be opened following a Ctrl+click on a marker?')
regex.target: .setDesc('Ctrl+点击标记后，应该如何打开相应笔记？')

regex.source: .setDesc('How should the corresponding note be opened following a middle-click on a marker?')
regex.target: .setDesc('中键点击标记后，应该如何打开相应笔记？')

regex.source: .setDesc('How should Map View open by default (e.g. when clicking the ribbon icon, or from within a note).')
regex.target: .setDesc('地图视图应如何默认打开（例如，点击功能区图标时，或从笔记内部）。')

regex.source: .setDesc('How should Map View open when Ctrl is pressed.')
regex.target: .setDesc('按住 Ctrl 键时，地图视图应如何打开。')

regex.source: .setDesc('How should Map View open when using middle-click.')
regex.target: .setDesc('使用中键点击时，地图视图应如何打开。')

regex.source: .setDesc('Which way should the pane be split when opening in a new pane.')
regex.target: .setDesc('在新窗格中打开时，窗格应如何拆分。')

regex.source: .setDesc("'Open in' actions showing in geolocation-relevant popup menus. URL should have {x} and {y} as parameters to transfer, and an optional {name} parameter can be used.")
regex.target: .setDesc("'在与地理位置相关的弹出菜单中显示的“打开方式”操作。URL 应包含 {x} 和 {y} 作为传输参数，并可选择使用 {name} 参数。")

regex.source: .setDesc('Customizable rules for converting URLs of various mapping services to coordinates, for the purpose of the "Convert URL" action.')
regex.target: .setDesc('用于将各种地图服务的 URL 转换为坐标的可自定义规则，用于“转换 URL”操作。')

regex.source: .setDesc('Save and delete tiles for offline usage. Also available via the context menu of the map.')
regex.target: .setDesc('保存和删除瓦片以供离线使用。也可通过地图的上下文菜单访问。')

regex.source: .setDesc('Automatically store all viewed tiles to be available locally. Great for performance but takes some storage. When this is off, only tiles explicitly downloaded for offline storage are kept.')
regex.target: .setDesc('自动存储所有已查看的瓦片，以便本地可用。对性能有很大帮助，但会占用一些存储空间。关闭此功能后，将仅保留明确下载用于离线存储的瓦片。')

regex.source: .setDesc('Remove old tiles on Obsidian startup to keep your map up-to-date. This currently applies both to auto-cached and explicitly downloaded tiles.')
regex.target: .setDesc('在 Obsidian 启动时移除旧的瓦片以保持地图最新。这目前适用于自动缓存和明确下载的瓦片。')

regex.source: .setDesc('Remove tiles by age on Obsidian startup if the storage size is too high. This currently applies both to auto-cached and explicitly downloaded tiles.')
regex.target: .setDesc('若存储空间占用过高，Obsidian 启动时根据时效删除瓦片，此规则适用于自动缓存和显式下载的瓦片。')

regex.source: .setDesc('If the native app is not used, determines how to launch the geo helper.')
regex.target: .setDesc('如果未使用原生应用程序，则确定如何启动地理助手。')

regex.source: .setDesc('Use this for advanced settings not controllable by the GUI above. Beware - uncareful edits can get Map View to faulty behaviors!')
regex.target: .setDesc('使用此功能进行上述 GUI 无法控制的高级设置。请注意 - 不小心的编辑可能导致地图视图出现故障！')

regex.source: .setPlaceholder('URL to open (directly or using the defined command; see README for more details)')
regex.target: .setPlaceholder('要打开的 URL（直接或使用已定义的命令；有关更多详细信息，请参阅 README）')
.setPlaceholder('包含1-2个捕获组的正则表达式')

regex.source: .setPlaceholder('Quick map embed: search for an address, landmark or business name to center the map on.')
regex.target: .setPlaceholder('快速地图嵌入：快速将地图视图居中到搜索地址、地标或企业名称。')

regex.source: alog(this.app, this.plugin, this.settings, 'custom', 'Find in map', null, null, markersByDistanceToCenter, true, [{ command: 'shift+enter', purpose: 'go without zoom & pan' }])
regex.target: alog(this.app, this.plugin, this.settings, 'custom', '在地图中查找', null, null, markersByDistanceToCenter, true, [{ command: 'shift+enter', purpose: '不缩放和平移' }])

regex.source: alog(this.app, this, this.settings, 'custom', 'Quick Map Embed', editor)
regex.target: alog(this.app, this, this.settings, 'custom', '快速地图嵌入', editor)
